name: Crystal Rock Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil in a saucepan.
2. Remove from heat and add 3 cups of sugar, stirring until dissolved.
3. Slowly add the remaining sugar, reheating the water if necessary.
4. Pour the mixture into three heat-proof jars or glasses.
5. Stir 3 drops of liquid food coloring and 1/2 teaspoon of flavoring into each jar.
6. Tie each length of string around a pencil.
7. Place the strings on top of the jars so that they hang in the liquid.
8. Crystals will begin to form after about 1 hour, and continue to solidify for several days.
9. If a layer forms on the surface of the jar, gently break it.
10. When the liquid completely evaporates, the candy is ready.
